claim: The frontier recovers known transcription-factor biology from perturbation alone, with no regulon supplied. Across 154 CollecTRI TFs that are major regulators here, their literature targets are 4.03x enriched among the genes their knockdown moved (Fisher combined p≈1e-26), and when a data edge meets a known one the sign agrees 63% of the time. 19 individual regulons clear significance on their own, and the screen flags 82 known edges where the data overrules the literature's sign.
